highlights: Built a custom ERP platform for Fleet Telematics and Mining Safety IoT, delivering CRM, CMS & enterprise modules with real-time analytics dashboards and complex dynamic charts. Integrated Microsoft SSO & services and Odoo, enabling unified enterprise operations.

Architected and scaled a custom UI component library using Shadcn, replacing fragmented third-party dependencies. Reduced npm size by 90% (10GB → 500MB), cut UI defects by 60%, and improved build stability.
Designed a Feature-First / Domain-First frontend architecture with atomic UI layering, reducing git merge conflicts by 60%, improving parallel development, and cutting project setup time by over 80%.

Engineered high-performance MERN applications, leveraging caching, prefetching, virtualization, pagination, and code splitting to improve load speed by nearly 90%. Designed modular, reusable UI systems, accelerating development cycles by 75%.

Built secure, scalable backend services, implementing robust authentication, authorization, and file handling. Enabled automated deployments through a Git-based CI/CD pipeline, reducing manual effort by 90% and accelerating release cycles by 85%.
